vocab.example: Winning the tournament was a collective endeavor that required every player to be at their absolute best.

vocab.meaning: sự cam kết kiên định/không lay chuyển
vocab.example: Being part of a varsity team demands an unwavering commitment to grueling training schedules.

vocab.meaning: sự phối hợp mang tính chiến thuật
vocab.example: In volleyball, strategic coordination between the setter and the hitter is paramount to scoring points.

vocab.meaning: rèn luyện/thấm nhuần tính kỷ luật
vocab.example: Competitive basketball helped instill discipline in me, which has been invaluable in my professional life.
The beauty of a sports team lies in mutual accountability; you simply don't want to let your teammates down.
Navigating through shared setbacks, like losing a close match, actually made our bond much tighter.

vocab.meaning: chiến thắng nghịch cảnh/vượt qua mọi dự đoán
vocab.example: Our underdog team managed to triumph against the odds, securing the gold medal in the final minute.

vocab.meaning: sự hợp tác nhịp nhàng/hòa hợp
vocab.example: The relay race is a perfect example of harmonious collaboration, where every transition must be flawless.

vocab.meaning: sự hướng dẫn/dìu dắt từ bạn đồng lứa
vocab.example: I benefited greatly from peer mentorship, as the senior players often shared their techniques with us novices.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tinh thần thể thao (thượng võ)
vocab.example: Being on the team taught me how to cultivate sportsmanship, showing respect to opponents regardless of the outcome.
